# Support

Use the channels below so questions land in the right place.

## Where to ask

- Bug reports: use the bug report issue form
- Feature ideas: use the feature request issue form
- Security concerns: follow [SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md)
- Contribution questions: check [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Before opening an issue

- Read the README and existing issues first.
- Include the steps you already tried.
- Share enough context to reproduce the problem.

Support is provided on a best-effort basis.
